content: OWL 2 DL reasoners in 2025-2026: HermiT (bundled with Protege 5.6.1, actively used but documentation limited), Pellet (open-source AGPL + commercial, Stardog-maintained repo, low recent activity), Openllet (fork of Pellet, last major release 2019, intermittently maintained), ELK (specializes in OWL 2 EL profile only, not full DL, much faster classification for large ontologies). No reasoner has seen major 2025-2026 releases; HermiT via Protege/OWL API remains the most practically usable default for DL consistency checking.
